title.en: Load-Balancing Architecture Choices for Internal Microservice Calls
title.zh: 面向微服务内部调用的负载均衡架构选择

summary.en: A practical guide to choosing client-side or sidecar load balancing for east-west traffic while keeping gateways and ingress layers for north-south traffic.
summary.zh: 系统比较网关负载均衡与客户端负载均衡，给出微服务内部调用场景下的默认架构选择、算法建议与落地实践。

readingDirection.en: Read this when deciding how internal service calls should select instances and which load-balancing strategy fits modern microservice traffic.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在设计微服务内部调用链路、选择负载均衡策略或规划服务治理演进路径时阅读。
